case_title: GOODMAN LUMBER COMPANY VS LAZARO, BENJAMIN R.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAZARO, BENJAMIN R.
